title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Mindspace Business Parks REIT

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Mindspace Business Parks REIT
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Real Estate Agent looking for your next big career move? Mindspace Business Parks REIT in Bengaluru offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Mindspace Business Parks REIT:
Mindspace Business Parks REIT is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Market Research

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mindspace Business Parks REIT!
